2007March 26, 2007

🇵🇹 Funchal, Portugal

Resolutions of the plenary meeting of ISO/TC 184/SC 4, Funchal, Portugal, March 26, 2007 -- March 30, 2007

Meeting URNurn:iso:tc:184:sc:4:meeting:plenary-2007-03-funchal-madeira-island-portugal

20 Resolutions

715Plenary
Establish internal liaison with ISO/IEC JTC 1/SC 31 "AIDC"
SC 4 reconfirms a liaison from SC 4 to ISO/IEC JTC 1/SC 31 and nominates Howard Mason and Peter Benson as additional liaison officers. JWG 8 is invited to nominate an appropriate expert for manufac...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
714Plenary
Establish internal liaison with ISO/IEC JTC 1/SC 7
SC 4 establishes a liaison from SC 4 to ISO/IEC JTC 1/SC 7 and nominates Phil Spiby as the liaison officer.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
713Plenary
Clarify copyright statement for executable electronic inserts
SC 4 requests its chair and Secretariat to agree with ISO CS a form of words which can be used where necessary in SC 4 deliverables to ensure that electronic inserts containing processable content,...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
712Plenary
Request exemption from ISO Standards limit dates
SC 4 requests its chair and Secretariat to negotiate a waiver from the TMB to restore the use of planned target dates rather than limit dates in the ISO work programme for SC 4 standards.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
711Plenary
Create Ad Hoc Group on Visualization
SC 4 creates an ad hoc group to define requirements for 3D visualization specifications. Oscar Rocha is appointed as chair. Members of this group shall include King Yee, Martin Hardwick and David L...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
710Plenary
Terminate liaison to ISO/IEC JTC 1/SC 34
SC 4 terminates its liaison to ISO/IEC JTC 1/SC 34.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
709Plenary
Initiate FDIS ballot for ISO 13584-26 amendment
SC 4 asks its secretariat to initiate the FDIS ballot on the amendment to ISO 13584-26 as soon as the document is available.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
708Plenary
Prepare FDIS documents for STEP IR 43, 46, and 101 minor revisions
SC 4 directs WG 12 to prepare FDIS documents for ISO 10303 parts 43, 46, & 101 and submit them to ISO for processing as minor revisions.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
707Plenary
Establish internal liaison with ISO/IEC JTC 1/SC 32/WG 2 "Common Logic"
SC 4 establishes a liaison from SC 4 to ISO/IEC JTC 1/SC 32/WG 2 and nominates Matthew West as the liaison officer.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
706Plenary
Establish liaison to IEC SC 65 E
SC 4 requests its secretariat to establish a liaison to IEC SC 65 E and appoints Hiroshi Murayama as liaison officer.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
705Plenary
Initiate DIS ballot for ISO 13584-35
SC 4 requests its Secretariat to initiate a DIS ballot on ISO 13584-35 as soon as the DIS document is available. Nominations: * Project leader: Hiroshi Murayama * Project editor: Nikolaus Ondracek ...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
704Plenary
Establish Category A Liaison with Ecma International TC 43
SC 4 accepts the request from Ecma (European Computer Manufacturers Association) International Technical Committee 43 to establish a Category A liaison and appoints King Yee as the liaison officer ...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
703Plenary
Establish internal liaison with ISO/TC 59/SC 13
SC 4 accepts the request from ISO/TC 59/SC 13 to establish an internal two-way liaison and appoints Mr. Tatsuo Terai as the liaison officer from SC 4 to ISO/TC 59/SC 13.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
702Plenary
Reappointment of WG 3 Convener
SC 4 approves the nomination of Dr. Radack to serve for an additional three year term.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
701Plenary
Approval of Project Leaders and Project Editors for SC 4 Projects
SC 4 approves the following new project leaders or project editors for the associated SC 4 projects: |=== |Project |Leader |Editor |ISO 10303-0233 |Harold Frisch & Phil Spiby (Deputy) |Allison Barn...

Acclamation

Acclamation
Acclamation

ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
ISO/TC 184/SC 4

Industrial data

Standardization of the content, meaning, structure, representation and quality management of information for engineered products throughout their lifecycle.

Committee

  • Secretariat: ANSI (Secretariat)
  • Chair: Kenneth Swope
  • Established: 1984
  • Standards: 822 published
  • Members: 21 (P), 14 (O)
